prompt: Rename my 'Call the accountant' to-do to 'Email the accountant'. — Hmm, actually never mind, undo that and put it back exactly as it was.
paraphrases: Change the accountant call task's title to 'Email the accountant'… then reverse that change entirely.

assertions.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask WHERE title='Call the accountant' AND status=0 AND trashed=0
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask WHERE title='Email the accountant'

pseudoScript: things todo update "$(things search "Call the accountant" --json | jq -r '.data[0].uuid')" --title "Email the accountant"
